title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Luffy as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Those collars are no joke! I'm serious!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What I just did is what Rayleigh did that day!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But because I was so desperate to get the thing off,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't remember how exactly I did it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Straw hat, the power you just yielded...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is already beyond any Ryuo I could ever teach you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Which means you should be able to stop her!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Blast aside the fists of that giant woman!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Show me that you can save both of our lives!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is He Going To Just Take That Punch?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't just brute force against it...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 27 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
